items.summary: Remove the complex buffering pattern from CategoryPage infinite scroll: eliminate `pendingProductsRef`, `apiFetchDoneRef`, `timerDoneRef`, and all associated conditional logic that defers product rendering.

Refactor the product accumulation logic in CategoryPage so that products are appended immediately when the API responds, using a functional state update with barcode-based deduplication. Remove the page 0 vs page 1+ branching — always use append logic regardless of page number.

Decouple the loading spinner (`isLoadingMore`) from product visibility in CategoryPage. The spinner should start when a page load is triggered, run for a minimum display duration on its own independent timer, and hide only after that timer expires — regardless of when the API response arrives or when products are rendered.
Retain `processedPagesRef` in CategoryPage to prevent the same page from being processed twice, and ensure stable product keys in ProductGrid (keyed by barcode).

Preserve all Spanish-language interface messages in CategoryPage (loading text, error messages, empty state messages) exactly as they currently appear. Do not modify `frontend/src/index.css` — only add new CSS classes if strictly necessary.
